violations.description: Helper seeds webhook/thread data per test but does not expose explicit teardown hook in this helper itself.
violations.suggestion: Optionally return cleanup callback or centralize cleanup in fixture teardown when runtime costs are acceptable.

recommendations: Consider explicit optional teardown helper for deep-isolation stress lanes
Current unique token strategy is appropriate for parallel execution
summary: Isolation is excellent: each scenario seeds independent context and avoids shared mutable state across tests.
